subject: perf: FlatList optimization, React.memo on hot components, memoize chart
body:
StationList FlatList: Added getItemLayout (estimated 136px per item),
removeClippedSubviews, and maxToRenderPerBatch=15 to reduce scroll jank
on lists of 20+ stations.

React.memo: Added to FuelTypeSelector, RadiusSelector, and PriceDisplay
to prevent unnecessary re-renders from parent scroll/filter changes.

PriceHistoryChart BarChart: Wrapped min/max/range reduce calculations
in useMemo to avoid recalculating on every render.

Tags: performance, flatlist, memo, useMemo
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: performance
Semver: patch
